ops.title: Track I: cc-interact + cc-orchestrate
ops.description: Blocked on P2b. cc-interact keeps public API + Envelope bytes; internals → SingleEntrant/Spawn/Takeover (pid-exit-wait as ladder config), wire.Server (gains same-UID check + MaxLine — has neither today), daemonkit version, drain.Simple (SSE streams register in-flight). cc-orchestrate: buildVersion → version.DevString; supervisor.go → supervise; XRPC untouched.

ops.text: Ported evict/spawn/activity suites + golden envelope bytes green; codex finder pass
Live SSE-drain check: upgrade under an open SSE stream, old finishes streams then exits
Loopback+Origin bypass rules unchanged; boot reconciliation precedes HTTP/SSE
